name: github_list_org_attestations_bulk_subject_digests
description: POST /orgs/{org}/attestations/bulk-list — list attestations for multiple subject digests. Requires subject_digests[]; optional predicate_type (provenance, sbom, release, or custom), per_page (1–100, default 100 when omitted), before, after cursors. Filtered by repo read access; fine-grained tokens need attestations:read. HTTP 200. See GitHub REST org attestations.
